SpaceHelmet.title: Space helmet
SpaceHelmet.description: Part of an EVA (Extra-Vehicular Activity) suit; the spacesuit counterpart is also needed for full functionality. Extremely uncomfortable to sleep in.

CowboyHat.title: Cowboy hat
CowboyHat.description: Considered as much of a fashion accessory as a practical means of protecting the head from the elements.

BeanieHat.title: Beanie hat
BeanieHat.description: Excellent at helping to keep your head warm.

CombatHelmet.title: Combat helmet
CombatHelmet.description: A hard helmet designed to protect the head when in combat.
